channel.title: ESET, spol. s r.o. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by ESET, spol. s r.o. (eset).

image.title: ESET, spol. s r.o. — recent CVEs

item.title: CVE-2026-10610 · 8.5 HIGH — Local privilege escalation in ESET security applications for macOS
item.description: Local privilege escalation potentially allowed an attacker to execute arbitrary code as a privileged user.

item.title: CVE-2026-7483 · 8.5 HIGH — Local privilege escalation in ESET security applications for macOS
item.description: Local privilege escalation potentially allowed an attacker to write an arbitrary file with fully controlled content as a privileged user.

item.title: CVE-2026-6424 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Use-after-free vulnerability in ESET security products for Linux
item.description: Use-after-free vulnerability in ESET Linux products potentially allowed an attacker to trigger kernel panic on the system

item.title: CVE-2026-6423 · 8.5 HIGH — Local privilege escalation via unauthenticated ALPC in ESET Inspect Connector
item.description: A local privilege escalation vulnerability in ESET Inspect Connector. The vulnerability was caused by improper authentication in an IPC channel.

item.title: CVE-2025-3716 · 5.3 MEDIUM — User enumeration in ESET Protect (on-prem)
item.description: User enumeration in ESET Protect (on-prem) via Response Timing.

item.title: CVE-2025-13818 · 8.3 HIGH — Local privilege escalation in ESET Management Agent for Windows
item.description: Local privilege escalation vulnerability via insecure temporary batch file execution in ESET Management Agent

item.title: CVE-2025-13176 · 8.4 HIGH — Local privilege escalation in ESET Inspect Connector for Windows
item.description: Planting a custom configuration file in ESET Inspect Connector allow load a malicious DLL.

item.title: CVE-2025-12460 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Stored XSS vulnerability in Afterlogic Aurora webmail
item.description: An XSS issue was discovered in Afterlogic Aurora webmail version 9.8.3 and below. An attacker can send a specially crafted HTML e-mail message with JavaScript in an img HTML tag. This could allow a remote attacker to load arbitrary JavaScript code in…

item.title: CVE-2025-4952 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Denial-of-service vulnerability in ESET security products for Windows
item.description: Tampering of the registry entries might have led to preventing the ESET security products from starting correctly on the next system startup or to unauthorized changes in the product's configuration.

item.title: CVE-2025-8088 · 8.4 HIGH 💥 — Path traversal vulnerability in WinRAR
item.description: A path traversal vulnerability affecting the Windows version of WinRAR allows the attackers to execute arbitrary code by crafting malicious archive files. This vulnerability was exploited in the wild and was discovered by Anton Cherepanov, Peter Koši…

item.title: CVE-2025-2425 · 5.1 MEDIUM — TOCTOU race condition vulnerability in ESET products on Windows
item.description: Time-of-check to time-of-use race condition vulnerability potentially allowed an attacker to use the installed ESET security software to clear the content of an arbitrary file on the file system.

item.title: CVE-2025-5028 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Arbitrary file deletion vulnerability in ESET product installers
item.description: Installation file of ESET security products on Windows allow an attacker to misuse to delete an arbitrary file without having the permissions to do so.

item.title: CVE-2025-3929 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Stored XSS vulnerability in MDaemon Email Server
item.description: An XSS issue was discovered in MDaemon Email Server version 25.0.1 and below. An attacker can send a specially crafted HTML e-mail message with JavaScript in an img tag. This could allow a remote attacker to load arbitrary JavaScript code in the cont…

item.title: CVE-2024-11859 · 8.4 HIGH — DLL Search Order Hijacking in ESET products for Windows
item.description: DLL Search Order Hijacking vulnerability potentially allowed an attacker with administrator privileges to load a malicious dynamic-link library and execute its code.

item.title: CVE-2025-2516 · 9.5 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Use of a weak cryptographic key in the signature verification process in WPS Office
item.description: The use of a weak cryptographic key pair in the signature verification process in WPS Office (Kingsoft) on Windows allows an attacker who successfully recovered the private key to sign components. As older versions of WPS Office did not validate the…

item.title: CVE-2024-11957 · 9.3 CRITICAL — Arbitrary Code Execution in WPS Office
item.description: Improper verification of the digital signature in ksojscore.dll in Kingsoft WPS Office in versions equal or less than 12.1.0.18276 on Windows allows an attacker to load an arbitrary Windows library. The patch released in version 12.2.0.16909 to mitig…

item.title: CVE-2024-11182 · 5.3 MEDIUM 💥 🌩️ — Stored XSS vulnerability in MDaemon Email Server
item.description: An XSS issue was discovered in MDaemon Email Server before version 24.5.1c. An attacker can send an HTML e-mail message with JavaScript in an img tag. This could allow a remote attacker to load arbitrary JavaScript code in the context of a webmail us…

item.title: CVE-2024-6654 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Denial of Service vulnerability in ESET products for macOS
item.description: Products for macOS enables a user logged on to the system to perform a denial-of-service attack, which could be misused to disable the protection of the ESET security product and cause general system slow-down.

item.title: CVE-2024-7400 · 8.5 HIGH — Local privilege escalation in ESET products for Windows
item.description: The vulnerability potentially allowed an attacker to misuse ESET’s file operations during the removal of a detected file on the Windows operating system to delete files without having proper permissions to do so.

item.title: CVE-2024-7263 · 9.3 CRITICAL — Arbitrary Code Execution in WPS Office
item.description: Improper path validation in promecefpluginhost.exe in Kingsoft WPS Office version ranging from 12.2.0.13110 to 12.2.0.17115 (exclusive) on Windows allows an attacker to load an arbitrary Windows library. The patch released in version 12.1.0.17119 to…

item.title: CVE-2024-7262 · 9.3 CRITICAL 💥 — Arbitrary Code Execution in WPS Office
item.description: Improper path validation in promecefpluginhost.exe in Kingsoft WPS Office version ranging from 12.2.0.13110 to 12.2.0.16412 (exclusive) on Windows allows an attacker to load an arbitrary Windows library. The vulnerability was found weaponized as a si…

item.title: CVE-2024-7014 · 7.1 HIGH — Improper multimedia file attachment validation in Telegram for Android app
item.description: EvilVideo vulnerability allows sending malicious apps disguised as videos in Telegram for Android application affecting versions 10.14.4 and older.

item.title: CVE-2024-3779 · 6.1 MEDIUM — Denial of Service in ESET products for Windows
item.description: Denial of service vulnerability present shortly after product installation or upgrade, potentially allowed an attacker to render ESET’s security product inoperable, provided non-default preconditions were met.

item.title: CVE-2024-2003 · 7.3 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation in Quarantine of ESET products for Windows
item.description: Local privilege escalation vulnerability allowed an attacker to misuse ESET's file operations during a restore operation from quarantine.

item.title: CVE-2024-0353 · 7.8 HIGH — Local privilege escalation in Windows products
item.description: Local privilege escalation vulnerability potentially allowed an attacker to misuse ESET’s file operations to delete files without having proper permission.

item.title: CVE-2023-7043 · 3.3 LOW — Unquoted path privilege vulnerability in ESET products for Windows
item.description: Unquoted service path in ESET products allows to drop a prepared program to a specific location and run on boot with the NT AUTHORITY\NetworkService permissions.

item.title: CVE-2023-5594 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Improper following of a certificate's chain of trust in ESET security products
item.description: Improper validation of the server’s certificate chain in secure traffic scanning feature considered intermediate certificate signed using the MD5 or SHA1 algorithm as trusted.

item.title: CVE-2023-5631 · 6.1 MEDIUM 💥 🌩️ — Stored XSS vulnerability in Roundcube
item.description: Roundcube before 1.4.15, 1.5.x before 1.5.5, and 1.6.x before 1.6.4 allows stored XSS via an HTML e-mail message with a crafted SVG document because of program/lib/Roundcube/rcube_washtml.php behavior. This could allow a remote attacker to load arbit…

item.title: CVE-2023-3160 · 7.8 HIGH — Local privilege escalation in security products for Windows
item.description: The vulnerability potentially allows an attacker to misuse ESET’s file operations during the module update to delete or move files without having proper permissions.

item.title: CVE-2023-2847 · 7.8 HIGH — Local privilege escalation in ESET products for Linux and MacOS
item.description: During internal security analysis, a local privilege escalation vulnerability has been identified. On a machine with the affected ESET product installed, it was possible for a user with lower privileges due to improper privilege management to trigger…

item.title: CVE-2022-4020 · 8.1 HIGH — Acer Aspire BIOS vulnerability
item.description: Vulnerability in the HQSwSmiDxe DXE driver on some consumer Acer Notebook devices may allow an attacker with elevated privileges to modify UEFI Secure Boot settings by modifying an NVRAM variable.

item.title: CVE-2022-2402 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Stack Overflow in ESET Endpoint Encryption and ESET Full Disk Encryption for Windows
item.description: The vulnerability in the driver dlpfde.sys enables a user logged into the system to perform system calls leading to kernel stack overflow, resulting in a system crash, for instance, a BSOD.

item.title: CVE-2021-37851 · 7.3 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation in ESET product for Windows
item.description: Local privilege escalation in Windows products of ESET allows user who is logged into the system to exploit repair feature of the installer to run malicious code with higher privileges. This issue affects: ESET, spol. s r.o. ESET NOD32 Antivirus 11.2…

item.title: CVE-2022-27167 · 7.1 HIGH — Arbitrary File Deletion in ESET products for Windows
item.description: Privilege escalation vulnerability in Windows products of ESET, spol. s r.o. allows attacker to exploit "Repair" and "Uninstall" features what may lead to arbitrary file deletion. This issue affects: ESET, spol. s r.o. ESET NOD32 Antivirus 11.2 versi…

item.title: CVE-2022-0615 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Use-after-free vulnerability in ESET products for Linux
item.description: Use-after-free in eset_rtp kernel module used in ESET products for Linux allows potential attacker to trigger denial-of-service condition on the system.

item.title: CVE-2021-37852 · 7.8 HIGH — LPE in ESET products for Windows
item.description: ESET products for Windows allows untrusted process to impersonate the client of a pipe, which can be leveraged by attacker to escalate privileges in the context of NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM.

item.title: CVE-2021-37850 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Denial of service in ESET for Mac products
item.description: ESET was made aware of a vulnerability in its consumer and business products for macOS that enables a user logged on to the system to stop the ESET daemon, effectively disabling the protection of the ESET security product until a system reboot.
